s1.i1: This User Agreement (the "Agreement") governs the use of the online service (the "Service") provided by the Administration.
s1.i2: By using the Service, including launching the bot, registering, paying for services, or accessing materials, the User confirms that they have fully read this Agreement and accept it in its entirety.
s1.i3: If the User does not agree to the terms of the Agreement, they must stop using the Service.

s2.h: 2. Nature of services and digital goods
s2.i1: The Service provides digital goods and intangible services, including but not limited to: informational materials, training programs, consultations, digital products, and service offerings.
s2.i2_lead: Materials provided through the Service may include:
s2.i2_u2: original materials from the Administration and/or third parties;
s2.i2_u3: analytical reviews, compilations, recommendations, and structured data.
s2.i3: The User understands and agrees that the value of the Service’s digital goods and services lies in structuring, analysis, presentation, support, and updates, not in the exclusivity of individual pieces of information.
s2.i4: The Service does not claim or guarantee uniqueness, exclusivity, or unavailability of individual material elements outside the Service.

s3.i1: The Service is provided on an "AS IS" basis.
s3.i2_u1: that the Service will meet the User’s expectations;
s3.i2_u2: any financial, commercial, professional, or other results;
s3.i2_u3: uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service.
s3.i3_lead: The Administration is not liable for:
s3.i3_u1: any direct or indirect damages, including lost profits;
s3.i3_u2: consequences of the User applying the materials received;
s3.i3_u3: actions or inaction of third parties;
s3.i3_u4: temporary technical failures and access restrictions.
s3.i4: All decisions on applying materials, recommendations, and services are made by the User independently and at their own risk.

s4.i1: The Service is not intended to encourage, organize, or facilitate unlawful activity.
s4.i2: The User undertakes to use the Service only in compliance with applicable law and third-party rules.
s4.i3: Responsibility for the lawful use of the Service’s materials and services rests entirely with the User.

s5.i1: All materials published in the Service are protected by intellectual property law.
s5.i2: The User may not copy, distribute, resell, transfer to third parties, or otherwise use Service materials without the rights holder’s permission.
s5.i3: Violation of intellectual property rights may result in access to the Service being restricted without compensation.

s6.i1_lead: The Administration may suspend or restrict the User’s access to the Service in the event of:
s6.i1_u3: requirements of law or payment providers.
s6.i2: Restricting access does not release the User from obligations that arose earlier.
s6.i3: The Administration reserves the right to refuse service to Users whose actions may create increased risks for the Service, payment providers, or third parties.

s7.i1: Payment for services and digital goods is made on the terms stated in the Service before payment.
s7.i2: Due to the intangible nature of digital goods and services, refunds after access has been granted are not provided, except in the cases listed below.
s7.i3_lead: A refund is only possible if:
s7.i3_u1: the service was not provided due to a technical fault of the Service;
s7.i3_u2: access to the digital good was not actually granted.
s7.i4: To request a refund review, the User must contact support within 24 hours of payment.
s7.i5: Refund decisions are made by the Administration on a case-by-case basis.
s7.i6: The User confirms that they will not initiate a payment reversal (chargeback) through payment systems without first contacting the Service’s support.

s8.u1: When subscribing to JungleVPN, you agree to pay the applicable fees and any taxes based on your location.
s8.u2: Subscription prices may change. We will notify you in advance of any price increase.
s8.u3: JungleVPN subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each subscription period until you cancel. Your payment method will be charged 24 hours before the subscription end date.
s8.u4: By entering payment details, you agree to automatic subscription renewal. You can turn off auto-renewal at any time in your JungleVPN account or by contacting support.
s8.u5: If we cannot process subscription payment, we may suspend your access to our Services until payment is received.
s8.u6: JungleVPN subscriptions are paid through third-party payment providers.

s9.i1: The Administration may collect the minimum technical data necessary for the Service to operate.
s9.i2: The Administration takes reasonable measures to protect data but does not guarantee absolute security of transmitted information.

s10.i1: The Administration may amend this Agreement.
s10.i2: The current version of the Agreement is published in the Service.
s10.i3: Continued use of the Service means the User agrees to the updated terms.

s11.i1: For all questions, the User may contact support via the form in the bot.
